name: Delicious Decimals
description: Add as many decimals as your hunger desires!

delicious-dial.name: Delicious Dial (DD)
delicious-dial.description:
Choose how your <cp>Delicious Decimals (DD)</cp> behave.

<cj>Definitive</cj>: The 'classic' mode. It directly uses your <cp>Delicious Decimals (DD)</cp> input.

<cj>Dynamix</cj>: Keeps your % in a constant place. This is noticeable with a larger <cp>Delicious Decimals (DD)</cp>.
<cr>RISK</cr>: With larger values, this will lag the game.

<cj>Deviation</cj>: Sequentially adds more <cp>Delicious Decimals (DD)</cp> to your screen based on <cf>Delicious Deviation Degree</cf> <cp>(DDD)</cp>

delicious-decimals.name: Delicious Decimals (DD)
delicious-decimals.description:
The amount of <cp>Delicious Decimals (DD)</cp> you want to display.

Min: 0

Max: This value will be limited to match your screen size when you open a level/close the mod Popup in the Pause Menu.

delicious-deviation-degree.name: Delicious Deviation Degree (DDD)
delicious-deviation-degree.description:
The rate of which the <cp>Delicious Decimals (DD)</cp> increase

Ensure you enable the <cj>Distribution</cj> in <cp>Delicious Dial (DD)</cp> setting to use this feature.

Min: 0.1

Max: 100.0
